scripts.build: npm run prebuild && astro build && node scripts/inject-markdown-routes.mjs
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/generate-og.mjs && npx tsx scripts/generate-page-markdown.ts && node scripts/generate-llms.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-resources.mjs
scripts.validate:agent-ready: npm run generate:markdown && npm run generate:llms && node scripts/validate-agent-resources.mjs
